svg.text: Each request handler can be mapped to a different URL • SearchHandler is a componentized RequestHandler that allows search components to be chained together and also enables the framework for distributed search operations. • Each Searchhandler can have it’s own custom set of search components, along with default or invariant parameters • All of the configuration is declarative – including adding new request handlers or search components. • The QueryResponse object is very generic and can handle returning any type of data
